notes: Good fundamentals: timingSafeEqual for HMAC, payload size limit, env secret validation >=16 chars, structured JSON logging, graceful shutdown. However: (1) timingSafeEqual crashes on length-mismatch instead of returning 401 (signature hex could differ in length); (2) x-forwarded-for used raw for rate limiting — trivially spoofable; (3) CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * is pointless/harmful on a server-to-server webhook endpoint; (4) error.message leaked to client on line 276 exposes internals; (5) payload-too-large path calls req.destroy() but never sends a 413 response — leaves client hanging; (6) appendFileSync blocks event loop on every log call — major anti-pattern in async server; (7) logger.currentDate set once at construction, never updates after midnight; (8) dedup cache cleanup timer is never cancelled on shutdown; (9) no request timeout — slow clients can hold connections indefinitely; (10) dedup Map has no max-size cap — unbounded memory under sustained load; (11) status code determination via string-matching error.message ('Unauthorized') is fragile. Overall well-structured with proper separation of concerns, retry+jitter, idempotency, and health endpoint, but several production-readiness gaps.
